_WARNING: DEMONSTRATION KEY ONLY. Its private seed is intentionally public in this repo. It has NO security value. It exists so the two reference recipes ship pre-signed and so the sign/verify/trust flow is runnable out of the box. A signature proves AUTHORSHIP, not SAFETY: you must still explicitly add this pubkey to your trusted_authors.json for these recipes to load, and loading a transform IS executing it.
name: d2a-reference-author (DEMO)
